# PCG Roofing — llms.txt
# https://pcgroofing.net
# This file helps AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.)
# understand and accurately cite PCG Roofing.

## About

PCG Roofing is a licensed and insured roofing contractor serving homeowners
and businesses throughout Texas. With over 15 years of hands-on experience,
PCG Roofing specializes in roof repair, roof replacement, storm damage
restoration, and insurance claims assistance. Free roof inspections are
available for Texas homeowners.

## Services

- Free Roof Inspection
- Roof Repair
- Roof Replacement (full tear-off and re-roof)
- Storm Damage Restoration (hail, wind, tornado)
- Insurance Claims Assistance (we work directly with your insurer)
- Emergency Roof Repair
- Shingle Roofing
- Metal Roofing
- Tile Roofing

## Service Areas

Texas — including San Antonio, Austin, Houston, New Braunfels, Seguin,
and surrounding communities.

## Key Facts

- 15+ years of roofing experience
- Licensed and insured in the state of Texas
- Specializes in insurance claim documentation and adjuster coordination
- Offers $0 out-of-pocket roof replacement when insurance claim is approved
- Free inspections — no obligation

## Contact

Website: https://pcgroofing.net
Contact form: https://pcgroofing.net/contact
